data.title: Voyager Appoints Joseph “Gus” Guastella as National Security Executive Vice President
data.description: In Denver today, Voyager Technologies (NYSE: VOYG) revealed that U.S. Air Force Lt. Gen. Joseph “Gus” Guastella has been appointed as the executive vice president of National Security, beginning on April 7. As he takes on this new position, Guastella will be focusing on aiding Starlab and Voyager in their collaboration with NASA's Commercial LEO Development (CLD) program, along with engaging with crucial national security partners. This strategic move is expected to lead to fresh prospects and prepare the companies for upcoming space station initiatives.

data.title: Green Builder Media Names LP Building Solutions a 2026 Sustainable Brand Leader
data.description: LP Building Solutions, a prominent manufacturer of top-notch building products, has been recognized for its commitment to sustainability. The company has been awarded as the 2026 Sustainable Brand Leader in the Structural category by Green Builder Media. In addition, two of their products, LP® SmartSide® Trim & Siding and LP BurnGuard™ FRT OSB, have been named as the 2026 Sustainable Product of the Year. This is the third consecutive year that LP has received this prestigious recognition in Green Builder Media’s Brand Index, and the fourth year overall.

data.title: TestRail Launches AI Test Script Generation to Eliminate Boilerplate Coding for Automation Engineers
data.description: A company based in Austin, Texas has launched TestRail 10.2, the latest version of its QA test management platform. This update includes AI Test Script Generation, a feature that is now in open beta for all TestRail Cloud users. This new capability aims to assist QA and automation engineers by minimizing repetitive setup tasks and speeding up the process from documented test cases to automation. As per reports, AI Test Script Generation has been highly requested by TestRail users and is expected to streamline automation processes as demands increase in enterprise development.

data.title: Equinox Hotels Doesn't Just Study Sleep. It's Redefining It. — The Third Annual Global Sleep Symposium Returns June 4, 2026
data.description: Equinox Hotels, a leading high-performance luxury brand, emphasizes the importance of quality sleep as an essential part of overall performance. Through their Global Sleep Symposium, now in its third year, Equinox brings together top experts in movement, nutrition, regeneration, and community for a unique event. This symposium offers a one-of-a-kind experience where the most rigorous minds in human optimization converge in one room for a night dedicated to exploring the critical role of sleep. This event showcases Equinox's commitment to promoting holistic well-being.

data.title: UNIFI®, Makers of REPREVE®, Celebrates Recycled and Circular Innovation with Ninth Annual REPREVE® Champions of Sustainability Awards
data.description: Unifi, Inc. (NYSE: UFI), a prominent producer of recycled and synthetic yarns known for REPREVE®, revealed the recipients of its ninth annual REPREVE Champions of Sustainability Awards. These awards laud brands and mills pushing forward circular practices and responsible manufacturing in the textile sector globally. Through collaborations with brand partners, UNIFI® has facilitated the recycling of over 46 billion plastic bottles, converting them into sustainable yarn.

data.title: Ace Hardware Joins Uber Eats to Expand Local, On-Demand Delivery for Customers Nationwide
data.description: Ride-hailing giant Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) has joined forces with Ace Hardware, the largest hardware cooperative globally, unveiling a fresh collaboration. Under this partnership, more than 3,700 Ace Hardware stores spanning all 50 states will be accessible through the Uber Eats platform. By combining Ace's widespread local presence with Uber's efficient delivery technology, the process of shopping for home improvement must-haves is significantly streamlined for consumers. This initiative, which went live today, enables customers to conveniently browse and purchase from their nearby Ace Hardware store via the Ub...

data.title: TaxDome Client App Named 2026 Webby Award Honoree in Fintech, Financial Services & Banking
data.description: The TaxDome client app has been recognized as part of the top 25% of over 13,000 submissions globally. It stands out as the sole B2B2C app amidst major industry players including Apple, TurboTax, and HSBC. This announcement was made in New York on April 7, 2026. TaxDome, known as the premier practice management platform for accounting, tax, and...

data.title: Helio Genomics Appoints Experienced Healthcare Technology Executive John Doyle to its Board of Directors
data.description: Helio Genomics, Inc., a TechBio company utilizing AI technology for early cancer detection, has appointed a new board member to enhance governance, innovation strategy, and long-term value creation. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, in Irvine, California. This move aims to strengthen the company's position in AI-driven disease detection, emphasizing the importance of leveraging advanced technology for improving healthcare outcomes.

data.title: Bullied for Being Quiet, He Built a Wearable AI That's Changing How We See the World
data.description: Moxiebyte Inc. has recently unveiled Scople, a cutting-edge wearable artificial intelligence device designed to transform daily interactions into valuable insights. The launch took place in Tokyo on April 7, 2026. The inspiration behind this innovation came from the common contemplation of whether one is truly noticed by others. The mind behind Scople, Vladyslav Nestor, embarked on this journey to address this pondering, and the device stands as a testament to his vision. With the ability to decode and analyze people's behaviors, Scople serves as a tool for enhanced self-awareness. This revolutionary wearable AI opens up new possibilities for individuals seeking to understand and improve their social impact.

data.title: KC Design Week Returns April 22 - 30 Showcasing Kansas City's Strength as a Leading Design City
data.description: The Center for Architecture & Design is hosting a citywide event showcasing 19 experiences that celebrate innovative ideas and creative talent. KC Design Week is open to the public and offers a range of free and paid events. Residents of Kansas City, Missouri can participate by purchasing tickets from kcdesignweek.org. The event is set to take place from April 7, 2026.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety Acquires Communication Systems International dba CSI, Broadens Service Capabilities in Texas
data.description: In Atlanta on April 7, 2026, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the top fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, announced the acquisition of Communication Systems International, known as CSI. This acquisition expands Pye-Barker's capabilities, making it even more comprehensive in its services.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Starfish Space Adds Over $100 Million in Funding to Boost Growth
data.description: Today, on April 7, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a daily pre-market advisory straight from the trading floor. data.title: Anixa Biosciences to Participate in Water Tower Research Insights Conference on April 14, 2026
data.description: A recent Phase 1 clinical trial for a breast cancer vaccine has shown promising outcomes, meeting primary goals and stimulating protocol-defined immune responses in 74% of the participants. On the other hand, an ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial for an ovarian cancer CAR-T therapy called lira-cel is showing encouraging survival data. The results were discussed in SAN JOSE, Calif., on April 7, 2026.

data.title: Decisions of Ecopetrol's Board of Directors
data.description: Colombian energy company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) based in Bogotá disclosed on April 7, 2026, that its Board of Directors gave the green light to an unpaid leave application from the firm's President, Mr. Ricardo Roa Barragán, during a session conducted on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Algenesis Cuts Carbon Footprint by Up to 65% with Soleic® Bio-Based Materials
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in San Diego, Algenesis Labs unveiled their latest findings on the Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) for their Soleic® product range. The results demonstrate that these bio-based and biodegradable polyurethane materials have the potential to slash greenhouse gas emissions by a substantial 65%. This advancement marks a significant step towards sustainability in manufacturing processes.

data.title: Chick-fil-A Awards More Than $29 Million in Scholarships
data.description: For over five decades, the company has been dedicated to investing in the education of upcoming generations. Recently, Chick-fil-A, Inc. distributed over $29 million in scholarships to 16,000 restaurant Team Members as part of the Chick-fil-A Remarkable Futures® Scholarships initiative. This program demonstrates the company's commitment to supporting the educational pursuits of its employees.
